scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: docker start cc-pg; concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "sleep 4 && NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.docker:init: [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; [ -f ms-token.json ] || echo '{}' > ms-token.json; [ -f google-credentials.json ] || echo '{}' > google-credentials.json
scripts.docker:restart: docker-compose down && npm run docker:init && docker-compose up --build
